confidence_note: N=69 sessions — thresholds suitable for production validation.
hardware_note: All thresholds derived from real DualShock Edge hardware data. Replace bridge magic numbers with these values after validating false-positive rate at each skill tier.
phase17_note: L4 thresholds updated from 7-feature to 11-feature space (Phase 17 validation). Touchpad and tremor FFT features are 0.0 in all N=69 pre-Phase-17 sessions; they add zero-variance dimensions that slightly widen the threshold (+1.6% vs 7-feature).

l4_mahalanobis_anomaly.derivation: mean + 3sigma of per-session Mahalanobis distance from population centroid (11-feature biometric space, Phase 17). Feature space: trigger_resistance_change_rate, trigger_onset_velocity_l2/r2, micro_tremor_accel_variance, grip_asymmetry, stick_autocorr_lag1/5, tremor_peak_hz, tremor_band_power, touchpad_active_fraction, touch_position_variance.

l4_mahalanobis_continuity.derivation: mean + 2sigma of per-session Mahalanobis distance from population centroid (11-feature biometric space, Phase 17).

l5_cv_threshold.derivation: 10th percentile of per-session inter-press interval CVs (rising-edge R2 detection, same logic as validate_detection.py). Sessions used: 63 / 69 (excluded 6 with <20 presses).

l5_entropy_threshold.derivation: 10th percentile of per-session inter-press interval entropy (10-bin histogram). Sessions used: 63 / 69.

stick_noise_floor_lsb.derivation: mean of per-axis std across all sessions

imu_gyro_noise_floor_lsb.derivation: 95th percentile of per-axis gyro std across sessions
